title: Assertion error that does not match expectations
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(c1 INT NOT NULL, c2 VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT 'default_value');
INSERT INTO t2(c1, c2) VALUES (1, NULL), (2, 'test_value') ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE c2=DEFAULT(c2);
INSERT IGNORE INTO t2(c1) VALUES (3) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE c1=c1 + 1;
SELECT * FROM t2 WHERE c1 IN (SELECT c1 FROM t2 WHERE c2 IS NOT NULL);
UPDATE t2 SET c2='updated_value' WHERE c1 = (SELECT MAX(c1) FROM t2);
key_bug_features: INSERT IGNORE INTO t1 VALUES NULL ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
